cover: Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'Apex Test Coverage in the Age of AI'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'Stop Writing Boilerplate Tests'. Subtitle 'AI drafts setup code. Architects own assertions, limits, and risk.'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — 'Coverage is not confidence with shield icon', 'AI generates factories with robot icon', 'Humans validate business risk with checklist icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'OLD TEST HABIT' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box '2026 TEST HABIT' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: 'insert new Account(Name=\"Acme\"); System.assert(true);', right column green border '// GOOD' code: 'System.assertEquals(\"Escalated\", c.Status); System.assertEquals(1, Limits.getDmlStatements());'. BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'assert outcomes', 'test bulk behavior', 'mock integrations'. Footer bar: 'apex test coverage ai generated 2026'. Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines, 16:9 composition.
images: Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'AI-Generated Apex Tests: Coverage vs Confidence'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'Coverage Is Not Confidence'. Subtitle 'Boilerplate tests pass even when business logic is broken'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — '75% deployment gate with percentage icon', '0 meaningful assertions with warning icon', 'Hidden production defects with bug icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'BAD AI OUTPUT' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'REVIEWED TEST' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: 'Case c = new Case(Status=\"New\"); insert c; CaseEscalationService.run(); System.assert(true);', right column green border '// GOOD' code: 'System.assertEquals(\"Escalated\", updated.Status); System.assertEquals(queue.Id, updated.OwnerId);'. BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'assert state changes', 'assert side effects', 'assert negative paths'. Footer bar: 'AI can generate tests. It cannot define trust.'. Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.

Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'Apex Test Factory: Useful vs Unmaintainable'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'Do Not Let AI Build a Test Factory Monster'. Subtitle 'Small explicit factories beat generic magic builders'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — 'Readable scenarios with eye icon', 'Safe defaults with check icon', 'No hidden DML with database icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'FACTORY MONSTER' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'LEAN FACTORY' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: 'TestFactory.create(\"Case\", true, true, true, new Map<String,Object>());', right column green border '// GOOD' code: 'Case c = SupportTestDataFactory.supportCase(con.Id, \"High\", \"Web\"); insert c;'. BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'return records by default', 'name business intent', 'keep setup visible'. Footer bar: 'Factories should reduce noise, not hide behavior.'. Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.
